clickWordToRestart: Click the word to restart the timer
rulesStep1: Split into two or more teams.
rulesStep2: On your turn, describe the word on screen without saying it or any part of it.
rulesStep3: Your team guesses as many words as they can before the timer runs out.
rulesStep4: Tap the word to bring up the next one — score a point for each correct guess.
tip1: Start broad: say the category first, then narrow in.
tip2: Use opposites, synonyms and 'sounds like' for tricky words.
tip3: Lean on what your team shares — references and inside jokes land fast.
tip4: Don't get stuck — skip a hard word and keep the points flowing.
